summary: Sales Promo Code System, Unified Creative Generator, and Canonical Email Engine testing complete. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend components verified in code: SalesPromoStudio, EmailTriggersTab, Content Studio all properly implemented.

minor.issue: sales_promo_codes_enabled field not in PLATFORM_DEFAULTS - frontend uses its own default value

action_items: Consider adding sales_promo_codes_enabled to PLATFORM_DEFAULTS in /app/backend/services/settings_resolver.py for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: Sales Promo Code System: Properly validates codes against affiliates, other sales, and promotions collections
Unified Creative Generator: Shared service at /app/backend/services/creative_generator_service.py correctly used by both affiliate and sales routes
Canonical Email Engine: All email dispatchers properly check triggers from settings before sending
Rate-limiting: Order completed email uses email_sent_log collection to prevent duplicate sends
Email hooks properly wired into payment_proof_routes.py, order_ops_routes.py, and affiliate_application_routes.py

success_rate.frontend: Components verified in code - SalesPromoStudio, EmailTriggersTab, Content Studio all present

seed_data_creation: Staff user staff@konekt.co.tz already has sales promo code STAFF2024 from previous testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new systems built and tested: 1) Sales Promo Code System at /api/sales-promo/* - personal codes for sales staff with same validation as affiliate codes. 2) Unified Creative Generator at /app/backend/services/creative_generator_service.py - shared engine for Admin/Sales/Affiliate content generation. 3) Canonical Email Engine at /app/backend/services/canonical_email_engine.py - settings-driven emails with Resend API. Email triggers stored in admin_settings.settings_hub.email_triggers and accessed via /api/admin/email/triggers. Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub has Email Notifications tab. Staff dashboard at /staff/home includes SalesPromoStudio component.

details: GET /api/sales-promo/my-code - returns current code status
POST /api/sales-promo/create-code - creates unique code, validates against affiliates + other sales + promotions
GET /api/sales-promo/validate-code/{code} - checks availability (public endpoint)
GET /api/sales-promo/campaigns - returns campaigns with auto-injected promo code
GET /api/affiliate-program/campaigns - affiliate campaigns still work via shared generator
Campaigns include: name, selling_price, promo_code, product_link, caption, your_earning
Promo code correctly injected into product links and captions
GET /api/admin/email/preview/{template} - returns HTML preview for all templates
GET /api/admin/email/triggers - returns current trigger settings
Templates: payment_submitted, payment_approved, order_completed, group_deal_successful, affiliate_approved
All templates use brand settings from admin_settings
POST /api/payment-proofs/submit - triggers payment_submitted email
POST /api/payment-proofs/admin/{id}/approve - triggers payment_approved email
PATCH /api/admin/orders-ops/{id}/status?status=completed - triggers order_completed email with staff name + rating CTA
POST /api/affiliate-applications/{id}/approve - triggers affiliate_approved email
GET /api/admin/settings-hub - returns sales section with assignment_mode, smart_assignment_enabled
PUT /api/admin/settings-hub - can update settings
Email triggers accessed via separate /api/admin/email/triggers endpoint
Frontend EmailTriggersTab component has all trigger toggles
Order completed email uses email_sent_log collection to prevent duplicate sends
Checks for existing log entry before sending
